steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The phrase 'these characteristic works' signals something typical or signature about Edwards. The blank must convey being known or recognized for something — specifically for painting this kind of portrait.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — complaint about: Implies a bad or critical connotation. The passage treats the works as esteemed, not criticized. ✗
  • Choice B — question about: Suggests uncertainty about Edwards. The passage gives no reason to doubt his standing. ✗
  • Choice C — requirement for: Implies Edwards was required to paint these works. No such constraint is mentioned. ✗
  • Choice D — reputation for: Directly conveys being known for something. Edwards's signature, esteemed portraits naturally support his having a reputation for them. ✓
D is correct.
